Knight's Honor artifact

Triggers: 3 sec

Protective Dome
The unit creates a protective dome that protects all allies in a small radius around it and lasts for 5 sec. The artifact owner and allies in the dome take 80% less damage and restore 10% health every second.

Requirements: 90-100
